message:
feat(c-interop): implement full sqlite3, zlib, numpy C interop

- sqlite3: connect, cursor, execute, fetchone, fetchall, close
- zlib: compress, decompress, crc32, adler32
- numpy: array, zeros, ones, sum

Type system:
- Add sqlite_connection, sqlite_cursor, sqlite_rows, sqlite_row types
- Add type inference for sqlite3 method return values
- Add for-loop element type inference for sqlite_rows

Code generation:
- Add SQLite method dispatch in method_calls.zig
- Fix file method dispatch to not capture sqlite connections
- Add sqlite Row.print() method for Python-compatible output
- Update print statement to handle sqlite_row types

Fixes:
- Fix ArrayList API for Zig 0.15 (no more .init())

         return error.OutOfMemory;
     }
 
-    std.debug.print("[DEBUG] module_functions.tryDispatch: module={s}, func={s}\n", .{ module_name, func_name });
-
     // O(1) module lookup, then O(1) function lookup
     if (ModuleMap.get(module_name)) |func_map| {
-        std.debug.print("[DEBUG]   Module found in ModuleMap\n", .{});
         if (func_map.get(func_name)) |handler| {
-            std.debug.print("[DEBUG]   Function found, calling handler\n", .{});
             try handler(self, call.args);
             return true;
         }
-        std.debug.print("[DEBUG]   Function NOT found in module\n", .{});
-    } else {
-        std.debug.print("[DEBUG]   Module NOT found in ModuleMap\n", .{});
     }
 
     return false;
